title: CLO Result
description: What a backend writes back after executing a Command on CLO's main thread. Produced by runtimes/python-script/clo_agent.py and (eventually) the C++ plugin, byte-compatible.

ok.description: True if the command executed without a fatal task error.

id.description: Correlation id echoed from the Command, if any.

mode.description: task | introspect | error — how the run was dispatched.

result.description: The command's structured output (any JSON value), or null.

stdout.description: Captured stdout from the task (echoed to CLO's Log Console too).

errors.description: Per-API-call errors keyed by a label, so a partial read-back still returns.

task_error.description: Traceback if the whole task aborted, else null.

in_clo3d.description: False if run outside CLO (the *_api modules were unavailable).
